---
title: "Teaching"
---

### 2024

- **Numerical analysis for engineers (lecture).** 1st year of Engineering bachelor.  
  Winter semester, Université Laval, Québec, CA.

### 2018

- **Mathematics for engineers (exercises).** 1st year of Engineering bachelor.
  Autumn semester, University of Luxembourg, Luxembourg, LUX.

### 2015

- **Linear ODEs (lecture & exercises).** 1st year of Biology bachelor.
  2nd Half of Autumn semester, Université de Franche-Comté, Besançon, FR.

### 2014

- **Linear ODEs (exercises).** 1st year of Biology bachelor.
  2nd Half of Autumn semester, Université de Franche-Comté, Besançon, FR.
